_comment: Foundation F2 — FROZEN golden vectors for ComputeS256Challenge (PKCE S256). want_challenge = base64url-nopad(SHA256(verifier)). VECTOR-CHANGE POLICY: these expectations are hand-/spec-verified and MUST NOT be auto-regenerated by the code under test. Changing any frozen want_challenge requires a `VECTOR-CHANGE:` PR trailer and human review (a change here means the crypto output changed — usually a bug). A value of "<FILL>" is a not-yet-frozen vector: the test FAILS loudly and prints the computed value so a human can verify and freeze it.
